description: Static marathon BT infrastructure communication manifest. All items are excluded from the Generic ROS Facade business log.

interfaces.name: ~log/tree
interfaces.purpose: publish BT tree snapshot for rqt_py_trees visualization

interfaces.name: ~ascii/snapshot
interfaces.purpose: publish unicode tree display string

interfaces.name: ~tip
interfaces.purpose: publish currently executing tip node

interfaces.name: /bt/marathon/bb/robot_state
interfaces.purpose: mirror latched BB key for ROSA diagnostics

interfaces.name: /bt/marathon/bb/line_data
interfaces.purpose: mirror latched BB key for ROSA diagnostics

interfaces.name: /bt/marathon/bb/last_line_x
interfaces.purpose: mirror latched BB key for ROSA diagnostics

interfaces.name: /bt/marathon/bb/camera_lost_count
interfaces.purpose: mirror latched BB key for ROSA diagnostics

interfaces.name: /bt/marathon/bb/tick_id
interfaces.purpose: mirror BT tick counter for ROSA diagnostics

interfaces.name: ~bt/mode
interfaces.purpose: publish current BT exec mode (RUN/PAUSE/STEP), latched

interfaces.name: ~bt/run
interfaces.purpose: set BT exec mode to RUN

interfaces.name: ~bt/pause
interfaces.purpose: pause BT ticking

interfaces.name: ~bt/step
interfaces.purpose: queue one BT tick then revert to PAUSE

interfaces.name: /imu
interfaces.purpose: fall detection — updates robot_state in live store

interfaces.name: /object/pixel_coords
interfaces.purpose: line detection — updates line_data in live store

interfaces.name: /ros_robot_controller/set_buzzer
interfaces.purpose: buzzer publisher (node-level infra object); business calls logged by comm_facade
interfaces.notes: publisher object owned here; actual business emit_comm logging in comm_facade.publish_buzzer

interfaces.name: /ainex_color_detect/color_detect
interfaces.purpose: color detection configuration (line color, ROI)

interfaces.name: walk_ready
interfaces.purpose: initial posture on node startup

interfaces.name: stand
interfaces.purpose: final posture on node shutdown

interfaces.name: ~start
interfaces.purpose: enable BT ticking (via Common base class)

interfaces.name: ~stop
interfaces.purpose: disable BT ticking (via Common base class)
